name: BB:HostDefinition: Windows Servers
notes: Edit this BB to define typical Windows servers, such as domain controllers or exchange servers. This BB is used in conjunction with the BB:False Positive: Windows Server False Positives Categories and BB:FalsePositve: Windows Server False Positive Events building blocks.
bb_references: BB:HostDefinition: Windows Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Windows Ports, BB:ProtocolDefinition: Windows Protocols
when the destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
